items.title: Russia killed opposition leader with frog poison, 5 European countries say

items.title: U.S., Iran to hold new round of nuclear talks in Geneva this week, Swiss government says
items.description: Iran and the United States will hold a second round of talks over Tehran's nuclear program next week, the Swiss Foreign Ministry said Saturday.

items.title: Stephen A. Smith teases 2028 presidential run
items.description: Sports commentator Stephen A. Smith said he is not ruling out a 2028 presidential campaign.
